final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing 3×3 grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) wellness content, featuring 9 individual cards that can be cleanly cut into separate posts.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic design, soft flat illustration with light skeuomorphic touches, premium lifestyle magazine aesthetic, ins-style wellness visual
Composition: 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), clear borders between each cell, generous padding within each card, centered content avoiding edges, vertical 3:4 aspect ratio overall
Subject: sleep wellness tips for women, featuring soft pillows, crescent moon, stars, warm milk, aromatherapy candles, books, sleep masks, curtains, cozy bedding as decorative elements
Scene/backdrop: cream white, beige, oat, and light caramel color palette as base, warm and soothing atmosphere, minimalist negative space
Lighting/mood: soft diffused ambient light, warm and healing mood, cozy bedtime atmosphere
Color palette: cream white and light oat as dominant, pale caramel as secondary, dark brown for text contrast, gentle and soothing color relationships
Materials/textures: smooth matte paper texture, subtle grain, clean vector-like illustrations with soft shadows
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" "3. 房间温度别太高" "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" "7. 固定上床时间" "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: must be cleanly divisible into 9 separate square images; all text must be Chinese characters only; each cell must function as standalone Xiaohongshu post; text must be large and highly legible; no text near grid borders
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, overly flashy decorations, garish colors, cluttered layout, English text, deformed characters, watermark, 8K stuffer words
